name: agentpal
description: Codex host plugin for installing AgentPal project thin bindings.

interface.shortDescription: Add AgentPal to the current Codex project.
interface.longDescription: AgentPal for Codex installs a host-level Codex plugin that can create, inspect, repair, and remove project-local AgentPal thin bindings without copying Pal assets or starting background services.
